---
title: "Análisis Econométrico: German Credit Dataset"
author: "dqdatasci"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  pdf_document:
    latex_engine: xelatex
    toc: true
  html_document:
    toc: true
    theme: flatly
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)

# Carga de librerías
library(caret)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(stargazer)
library(margins)

# Cargar dataset
data("GermanCredit")
```
